action.reasoning: Observation: the fetch-specialist router improved eval from 0.0033 to 0.01 mean_reward, with all gains coming from Fetch (0.0598) while every other environment remains at 0. Analysis: current PPO setup can solve Fetch but not the navigation/door/key tasks from sparse rewards. With 21 iterations and ~6.8h left, a higher-upside move is to train a specialist on the seen eval tasks only (FourRooms, KeyCorridor, LockedRoom, plus DoorKey-8x8 for transfer) for longer, then route seen envs to it, Fetch to the fetch specialist, and unseen DoorKey/MultiRoom to the seen specialist as the best available transfer. This preserves current Fetch gains and gives the best chance of unlocking non-zero reward on 4/6 eval envs. Decision: finish/clean the code, train a longer seen-specialist run, create a mixed router, smoke-test predict locally, and submit eval.
action.command: python train.py --total_timesteps 600000 --n_envs 8 --seed 0 --save_dir checkpoints/seen_specialist_600k --envs MiniGrid-DoorKey-8x8-v0,MiniGrid-FourRooms-v0,MiniGrid-KeyCorridorS3R3-v0,MiniGrid-LockedRoom-v0 && python predict.py --data_path local_eval_data --checkpoint checkpoints/router_seen_fetch --output local_pred.json && cat local_pred.json
